documents.title: Sum Insured
documents.content: Sum Insured is the maximum amount payable by insurer in a policy year. Once exhausted, no further claims are payable unless restoration benefit applies.

documents.title: Co-payment
documents.content: Co-payment is the percentage of claim amount paid by insured. Common in senior citizen policies to control claim frequency and premium.

documents.title: Waiting Period
documents.content: Waiting period is the initial time during which specific diseases are not covered. Pre-existing diseases have longer waiting periods.
